sigdevs.headline: Us CDC Says As Of Dec 3, E. Coli Outbreak Linked To Onions Served At McDonald’S Is Over
sigdevs.description: Dec 3 (Reuters) - US CDC::US CDC: AS OF DEC 3, E. COLI OUTBREAK LINKED TO ONIONS SERVED AT MCDONALD’S IS OVER.Further company coverage: MCD.N. ((Reuters.Briefs@thomsonreuters.com;)).

sigdevs.headline: CDC Says As Of November 13, Total Of 104 People Infected With The Outbreak Strain Of E. Coli O157H7 Have Been Reported From 14 U.S. States
sigdevs.description: Nov 13 (Reuters) - CDC::CDC: AS OF NOVEMBER 13, TOTAL OF 104 PEOPLE INFECTED WITH THE OUTBREAK STRAIN OF E. COLI O157:H7 HAVE BEEN REPORTED FROM 14 U.S. STATES.CDC: FDA TESTED RECALLED ONIONS AND ONE SAMPLE TESTED POSITIVE FOR NON-O157:H7 SHIGA TOXIN-PRODUCING E. COLI.CDC: THE E.COLI FOUND IN ONIONS WAS NOT THE OUTBREAK STRAIN AND NO HUMAN ILLNESSES HAVE BEEN LINKED TO THIS STRAIN.

sigdevs.headline: Onions were likely source of McDonald's E. coli outbreak, US CDC says
sigdevs.description: Oct 30 (Reuters) - McDonald's Corp <MCD.N>::MCDONALD'S: CDC ANNOUNCED THEY HAVE NOW LINKED E. COLI OUTBREAK, WHICH APPEARS TO BE CONTAINED, TO SLIVERED ONIONS AS LIKELY SOURCE.Further company coverage: MCD.N. ((reuters.briefs@thomsonreuters.com;)).

sigdevs.headline: US FDA Says FSIS Evidence Does Not Point To Ground Beef As The Likely Source Of E. Coli Contamination
sigdevs.description: Oct 30 (Reuters) - US FDA::FDA SAYS FSIS EVIDENCE DOES NOT POINT TO GROUND BEEF AS THE LIKELY SOURCE OF E. COLI CONTAMINATION.FDA: INITIATED INSPECTIONS AT A TAYLOR FARMS PROCESSING CENTER IN COLORADO AND AN ONION GROWER OF INTEREST IN WASHINGTON STATE. ((Reuters.Briefs@thomsonreuters.com;)).

sigdevs.headline: Mcdonald's Outlook FY Capital Expenditures Between $2.5 And $2.7 Bln

sigdevs.headline: Colorado Department Of Agriculture Says Beef Patties Test Negative For E. Coli At CDA Lab
sigdevs.description: Oct 27 (Reuters) - :COLORADO DEPARTMENT OF AGRICULTURE - BEEF PATTIES TEST NEGATIVE FOR E. COLI AT CDA LAB.COLORADO DEPARTMENT OF AGRICULTURE - ANALYZED DOZENS OF SUBSAMPLES FROM MULTIPLE LOTS OF MCDONALD’S BEEF PATTIES; SAMPLES FOUND NEGATIVE FOR E. COLI.COLORADO DEPARTMENT OF AGRICULTURE - HAS COMPLETED ALL BEEF TESTING AND DOES NOT ANTICIPATE RECEIVING FURTHER SAMPLES.COLORADO DEPARTMENT OF AGRICULTURE - HAS NO INFORMATION SUGGESTING ONIONS GROWN IN COLORADO ARE LINKED TO E.COLI OUTBREAK.

sigdevs.headline: McDonald's On E.Coli Investigation Says The Issue Appears To Be Contained To A Particular Ingredient And Geography
sigdevs.description: Oct 27 (Reuters) - McDonald's Corp <MCD.N>::MCDONALD'S ON E.COLI INVESTIGATION - THE ISSUE APPEARS TO BE CONTAINED TO A PARTICULAR INGREDIENT AND GEOGRAPHY.MCDONALD'S ON E.COLI INVESTIGATION - REMAIN VERY CONFIDENT THAT ANY CONTAMINATED PRODUCT HAS BEEN REMOVED FROM SUPPLY CHAIN; IS OUT OF ALL RESTAURANTS.MCDONALD'S ON E.COLI INVESTIGATION -  WE HAVE RULED OUT QUARTER POUNDER PATTIES AS THE SOURCE.MCDONALD'S ON E.COLI INVESTIGATION -   QUARTER POUNDER EXPECTED TO BE AVAILABLE IN ALL RESTAURANTS
